review_title: The most affordable go-to SEO tools
description: Amazing. Is the simplest but powerfull software to make your SEO moves. As mentioned, the only thing that you need is to open SEO Checker, write down some urls and start making magic
author: 🔵 Luis A.
pros: It's an easy, straightforward tool that allows me to make the SEO moves that I need quickly. Doesn't have a fancy UI, but it's so powerful that I can make a lot of SEO Analysis at lightning speed. Also, you could find it for less than 10 bucks on Appsumo! So it's really affordable. This can help you to make a more in-depth serious SEO analysis, also you could extract enough data to build your keyword strategy.
cons: The UI, it's vintage-like, but the most important is the product itself. Also, Vovsoft is knows exactly for this: vintage-like UI's but powerful software

review_title: Best SEO sofware at a great price
description: This is an amazing software that I use almost daily. For small sites this is the best and quickest SEO audit tool, it uses very minimal RAM on my PC and gives every required detail.
author: siddardha T.
pros: Its easy to use and works perfectly for all the features it offers. the price is great as we don't find good SEO products for this cheap anywhere else. The export function is great as we can filter and manipulate the data as we need in excel
cons: Limited features, no complains though as the price is great. A additional rank tracking feature would help though. Hope they add it soon.

review_title: A cheaper way to get technical SEO data from your website.
description: I was pleased that it had lots of helpful data when looking at the technical data for my website.
author: Joseph K.
pros: I liked that there was a trial and that it was much like the more expensive tools out there but for a much smaller price. I think this would be great for junior or beginner SEO specialists.
cons: I didn't like that there weren't graphs or colors to show issues other than text. Making some visuals would make this software great.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I just started using SEO Checker this week. It was easy to set up and I like the clear score for each page. The tips are simple to follow, like fixing missing meta tags and slow images. I improved two blog posts already and saw better rankings after a few days. I wish the free plan had more page audits, but overall it’s helpful for beginners like me.
author: Fábio Samuel dos Santos C.
pros: I’m new to SEO and SEO Checker made things much easier for me. The dashboard shows problems in plain language, and the checklist tells me exactly what to do next. I fixed title tags, added alt text, and compressed images based on the suggestions. The site speed report is great. Some advanced settings are a bit confusing at first, but the guides and tooltips helped. Good tool if you’re starting out.
cons: As a beginner, I struggled to know what to fix on my site. SEO Checker pointed out broken links, missing descriptions, and slow pages. I followed the recommendations and my pages now load faster and look better in search. The UI is clean, and the weekly audits keep me on track. I’d like more integrations for content editors, but for core SEO checks it works well.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I like the value i spend on it because is cheaper and the softward fills perfect at the use i planned for it.
author: SAC L.
pros: It's help me do my tasks when i public my sellings . helped me to find key words at specific demand for a product.
cons: at this time i dont encounter no counter to not recommend the product i like it and the way i use is pretty ok.

review_title: Helps in evaluating & improving the website ranking on Google
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - This is a simple tool to check all the inbound links and their domain score - Helps us in improving our website performance - Helps us to improve our reader's experience - Helps in keyword performance - Helps to identify & correct crawling errors
cons: - It's time-consuming. - The analytics need time & experience to comprehend - It requires a lot of consistent efforts

review_title: My experience working in SEO with SEO Checker
description: As a complementary tool to others that I usually use to do seo analysis of my websites, it has been very useful to find aspects to improve, especially in the definition of h1 and h2 tags; and allowing complementing with other Google tools in its contextual menu also makes my job easier.
author: Luis Enrique S.
pros: The ease with which I can analyze the different links that a website has, and be able to determine such important aspects as the type of link, its length and its h1 and h2 tags, and others. The different options offered by the contextual menu of the tool also greatly facilitates any seo analysis of a website.
cons: For those of us who are not SEO experts, it seems to me that you should have better help options and tutorials for using the tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Value for money tool to create a sitemap, check links, headings, meta descriptions to improve SEO.
description: SEO checker is a lightweight tool to check and improve the SEO for websites with a lot of links. Is totally value for money.
author: Jitin S.
pros: SEO checker is a lightweight, totally value for money tool to check a lot of links, titles, headings and meta descriptions. One can export csv reports to work on them and improve SEO for website.
cons: SEO checker is very good at what it does like creating a sitemap, checking validity of links in large numbers and checking the titles, headings and meta descriptions. I have not faced any issues while using the software and is a good tool to have.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Awesome App for onsite SEO Analysis
author: Sridhar P.
pros: Tags analysis, Links analysis, Sitemap Analysis, and generator. Low Price is an added advantage.
cons: It should have been very nice if we have the best keyword analysis as well. In all onsite technical aspects this tool is very good.

description: i found it in google and i think its one of the best SEO software out there, simple, reliable and accurated.
author: Leandro C.
pros: Easy to use, cheap and accurated. Useful info at really low price.
cons: Its not flashy or minimal design, some people would thin that looks cheap.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Andrei B.
pros: First time when I heard about this app I had my doubts because of the price but the purchase was made before trial ended. Site analyzer and backlink management are the fest features for me, helps me with on page and off page SEO and this is seen in the organic traffic.
cons: Availability only on Windows OS, not a deal breaker.

author: Trung N.
pros: Its convinience for my teaching job especially in Covid social distance
cons: nothing for me because I am satisfied with this software

review_title: SEO Checker Review by PC-Bg Fixer
description: Used SEO Checker on a lot of Websites and keeps me surprised as to what it detects that may have been overlooked while developing a website.
author: Roger H.
pros: Excelent value for money, does as good a job as more expencive alternative seo checkers.
cons: Explanations sometimes feel unwieldly and it would take an advanced user to understand

author: Wolfgang L.
pros: Immer aktuelle Software zu sensationellem Preis
cons: Anfang etwas schwierig aber dann Süper einfach.

author: Valentin C.
pros: It's easy to use, features are completely here !
cons: Ii looks like a little old school design soft

review_title: SEO Checker - Great value for money
author: Noel F.
pros: A simple way to get great data about a website.
cons: I would like the output to be in one spreadsheet / database for ease of use. Plus being abl e to create a report for clients.

author: beta K.
pros: If you are new to SEO or just need basic website audit, you can try SEO Checker because it's so cheap, no recurring fee, just one time payment and you got lifetime updates!Despite the low price, you got all the basic SEO stuff such as list of page title, heading, description, internal link, etc.well you can even export the result to csv.
cons: For the price they offer, actually SEO checker is quite good, but here some suggestion:- windows only, no linux version.- No build in report tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Kunwer A.
pros: I usually get to use SEO Checker for my projects and my personal website, It's quite useful.
cons: There are veriety of feature this tool is offering still it needs some more features.
